title: Pyonpack for PojavLauncher
description: A kitchen sink modpack with mods chosen by the PyonSMP members, with special mods to support PojavLauncher.
body:
This modpack is made because of users asking to add PojavLauncher compatibility to Pyonpack, sadly without breaking the main pack it's not possible.

This pack is relatively easy, it just merges [Pyonpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pyonpack) and [Haste](https://modrinth.com/modpack/plo). If you don't use Pojav - check out the main Pyonpack, it's pretty neat!

Haste features special Sodium version, which is optimized for PojavLauncher (uses older OpenGL), and also some other mods for better performance.
Pyonpack features a lot of different stuff: Create with different addons, Ad Astra with Argonauts and more!
